title: Questions with demonstratives
objective: Preguntar y responder sobre objetos usando this, that, these y those.

activities.feedback_correct: What is this? pregunta por una cosa cercana.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Una cosa singular usa this o that.

activities.feedback_correct: What are these? pregunta por varias cosas cercanas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Plural usa are y these o those.

activities.feedback_correct: These es plural y usa are.

activities.prompt: What are those? Those are pictures.
activities.question: What are those?
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la respuesta después de those.

activities.prompt: What is this? What is that? What are these? What are those?
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa is para singular y are para plural.

activities.prompt: What is this? It is a key. What are those? They are bags.
activities.question: What are those?

activities.feedback_correct: Las preguntas distinguen cantidad y distancia.
activities.feedback_incorrect: This/that usan is; these/those usan are.

activities.prompt: Ask the AI about four objects at different distances and answer its questions.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Mira si el objeto es singular, plural, cercano o lejano.
